title: Filter a table on workdocs containing a keyword
excerpt:
I’m using Monday workdocs in a column. 
It would be necessary to be able to search within the workdocs to filter the board on the workdocs containing the searched keyword, as you filter the board on a keyword contained i…

posts.author: sgentis (sgentis@escaet.fr)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using Monday workdocs in a column.

It would be necessary to be able to search within the workdocs to filter the board on the workdocs containing the searched keyword, as you filter the board on a keyword contained in a column.
